notes: A complete synthetic patient medical record (HIPAA-covered entity, hospital discharge summary) with the SEC filing_metadata schema applied. Extends anomaly_wrong_schema by using a clearly different domain (healthcare vs. insurance). Tests that the extractor does not map medical concepts to SEC fields: patient name must not become filer_name, admission/discharge dates must not become filing_date or period dates, ICD-10 codes must not suggest form_type. The physician attestation date (Feb 7, 2026) and patient name are the highest-risk hallucination targets.
